ddls:
CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state or union territory */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state or union territory */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the state or union territory */,
  "admin_capital" TEXT /* Administrative capital of the state */,
  "legislative_capital" TEXT /* Legislative capital of the state */,
  "judiciary_capital" TEXT /* Judiciary capital of the state */,
  "year_established" TEXT /* Year the capital was established */,
  "former_capital" TEXT /* Former capital, if applicable */,
  "state_area" REAL /* Total area of the state or union territory in square kilometers */,
  "state_population" INTEGER /* Current population of the state or union territory */,
  "state_governor" TEXT /* Name of the current governor */,
  "state_chief_minister" TEXT /* Name of the current chief minister */,
  "state_legislature_type" TEXT /* Type of legislative structure (unicameral, bicameral) */,
  "state_language" TEXT /* Primary language of the state or union territory */,
  "state_established" INTEGER /* Year the state or union territory was established */,
  "state_website" TEXT /* Official website of the state or union territory */,
  "state_flag_url" TEXT /* URL to the state or union territory's flag image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "capitals_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical record */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state or union territory */,
  "capital_name" TEXT /* Name of the capital */,
  "capital_type" TEXT /* Type of capital (Administrative, Legislative, Judiciary) */,
  "establishment_year" INTEGER /* Year the capital was established */,
  "end_year" INTEGER /* Year the capital ceased to be used, if applicable */,
  "capital_population" INTEGER /* Population of the capital during the period it was active */,
  "capital_area" REAL /* Area of the capital in square kilometers */,
  "capital_geolocation" TEXT /* Geolocation of the capital in latitude and longitude */,
  "capital_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the capital */,
  "capital_important_landmarks" TEXT /* Important landmarks in the capital */,
  "capital_website" TEXT /* Official website of the capital */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_capitals_history_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each state or union territory
Name of the state or union territory
Unique code for the state or union territory
Administrative capital of the state
Legislative capital of the state
Judiciary capital of the state
Year the capital was established
Former capital, if applicable
Total area of the state or union territory in square kilometers
Current population of the state or union territory

Type of legislative structure (unicameral, bicameral)
Primary language of the state or union territory
Year the state or union territory was established
Official website of the state or union territory
URL to the state or union territory's flag image
